flavorText: Fiend warlocks bargain with infernal powers for destructive magic and ruthless survivability.

features.description: You add spells to your warlock list: 1st (Burning Hands, Command), 3rd (Blindness/Deafness, Scorching Ray), 5th (Fireball, Stinking Cloud), 7th (Fire Shield, Wall of Fire), 9th (Flame Strike, Hallow).
When you reduce a hostile creature to 0 hit points, gain temporary hit points equal to your Charisma modifier + warlock level.
Once per long rest, add 1d10 to an ability check or saving throw after seeing the roll.
Choose one damage type and gain resistance to it; you may change the chosen type when you finish a short or long rest.
Once per long rest when you hit with an attack, banish the target through nightmare planes; it returns at end of your next turn and takes 10d10 psychic damage.

fiend-expanded-spells.summary: Your expanded list leans toward fire, domination, punishment, and infernal battlefield pressure.
fiend-expanded-spells.description: Expanded Spells here should signal that the patron grants aggressive, destructive magic and a darker resource profile than many other warlocks.

fiend-dark-ones-blessing.summary: When enemies fall, your patron rewards the carnage by hardening you with temporary hit points.
fiend-dark-ones-blessing.description: Dark One's Blessing pushes the Fiend warlock toward momentum-based combat where kills feed survival and encourage aggression.

fiend-dark-ones-own-luck.summary: Call on infernal favor to bend a crucial check or saving throw after seeing the roll.
fiend-dark-ones-own-luck.description: Dark One's Own Luck is a clutch reliability feature. It makes the subclass feel like its patron is always ready to tip fate at the exact wrong moment for everyone else.

fiend-fiendish-resilience.summary: Adapt your defenses to the punishment you expect and become harder to burn down cleanly.
fiend-fiendish-resilience.description: Fiendish Resilience is a tactical defense feature, not just passive text. It rewards anticipating the threat profile of the coming fight.

fiend-hurl-through-hell.summary: Momentarily cast a struck enemy through nightmare planes and return it broken by the experience.
fiend-hurl-through-hell.description: Hurl Through Hell is one of the subclass’s most iconic moments: a brutal, cinematic punishment that drags a target through nightmare planes before returning it broken by the experience.
fiend-hurl-through-hell.effect: The target is dragged through nightmare planes, returns at the end of your next turn, and takes 10d10 psychic damage.
